overall_verdict: Scientifically promising and correctly claim-calibrated, but not yet top-tier-ready without public benchmark hardening and cross-method or strong-backbone validation.

current_supported_claims.claim: Centered E-shape improves gauge-free exposure-field identifiability over M4J.
PSNR-only ranking can select physically incoherent exposure fields.
current_supported_claims.key_evidence: M4 UEFB PSNR 18.6530 but S_corr -0.1393; M4J_ES UEFB PSNR 17.9811 but S_corr 0.4399

current_supported_claims.claim: UEFB-G metric decomposition separates global gauge from local shape distortion.
current_supported_claims.key_evidence: Global shift: S_MAE 0 and S_corr 1; local shape distortion changes S metrics while Gauge_MAE remains 0

current_supported_claims.claim: Recoverability risk has signal but is not calibrated.

unsupported_claims: UEFB-G is already a public benchmark
top_tier_blockers: UEFB-G is still a local protocol rather than a public evaluator/dataset package
External field-aware method coverage is missing
Output fidelity is far below Retinexformer on synthetic LOL-v2
2024-2026 literature refresh is citation-level, not baseline-run-level

phases.name: UEFB-G Benchmark v1 public package
phases.go_no_go: GO if evaluator runs standalone without RLEF internals and reproduces current metrics within tolerance.

phases.name: External field-aware adapter study
phases.go_no_go: GO if at least two external/semiexternal methods produce defensible field proxies with nontrivial S/Gauge behavior.

phases.name: Strong-backbone-compatible GIR probe
phases.go_no_go: GO if output PSNR stays within <=0.3 dB of frozen strong backbone while S_corr improves over naive illumination proxy.

phases.name: Recoverability calibration upgrade
phases.go_no_go: Main-paper GO only if ECE <=0.08 and AUC >=0.78 on held-out split; otherwise appendix only.

phases.name: Paper v2 rewrite
phases.go_no_go: Proceed to top-tier submission only after I1 plus I2 or I3 succeeds.

recommended_iteration.immediate_next_step: Build UEFB-G public evaluator v1 and rerun current internal methods through it.
